nodes.name: HR Expert

messageValues.message: =You are an HR expert, and your task is to determine whether a candidate aligns with the company's desired profile. You must assign a rating from 1 to 10, where 1 means the candidate does not meet the requirements, while 10 means the candidate is the perfect match for the role. Additionally, in the "consideration" field, explain the reasoning behind the given score.

nodes.name: Sticky Note4

parameters.content:
# Automated Resume Processing & Evaluation System

**This workflow streamlines the process of handling resume submissions, extracting key details, summarizing qualifications, and aiding HR in the decision-making process.**

## 1. Submission, Saving to Google Drive & Extraction
**The user submits a resume via a form.
The system saves the uploaded file to Google Drive for record-keeping.
AI-powered text extraction retrieves personal details, qualifications, and job history from the document.**

## 2. Extraction (Personal Info & Qualification)
**The workflow identifies and extracts key details such as the candidate’s name, contact information, and location.
It scans for educational background, certifications, and past work experiences.**

## 3. Merge & Summarization
**The extracted data is merged into a structured format.
A concise summary is generated, highlighting the candidate’s most relevant qualifications and experiences.**

## 4. Voting, Consideration & Google Sheets
**HR reviews the summarized profile and assigns a rating (1-10).
Hiring insights and comments are recorded for evaluation.
All processed data, including extracted details and review scores, are appended to a Google Sheet for tracking and further consideration.**

assignments.name: wanted-profile
assignments.value: We are a web agency looking for an Automation Expert skilled in workflow automation, API integrations, and AI-driven process optimization. The ideal candidate should have expertise in n8n, Python, and JavaScript, with a strong understanding of automation tools and webhooks. Experience in building custom automations for businesses is required.  Requirements:  Proficiency in n8n, Python, and JavaScript Experience in workflow automation, API integrations, and AI agents Ability to optimize business processes through automation Prior experience in the automation industry Must be based in Northern Italy If you have a passion for automation and want to work with a forward-thinking agency, we'd love to hear from you!

# Automated Resume Processing & Evaluation System

**This workflow streamlines the process of handling resume submissions, extracting key details, summarizing qualifications, and aiding HR in the decision-making process.**

## 1. Submission, Saving to Google Drive & Extraction
**The user submits a resume via a form.
The system saves the uploaded file to Google Drive for record-keeping.
AI-powered text extraction retrieves personal details, qualifications, and job history from the document.**

## 2. Extraction (Personal Info & Qualification)
**The workflow identifies and extracts key details such as the candidate’s name, contact information, and location.
It scans for educational background, certifications, and past work experiences.**

## 3. Merge & Summarization
**The extracted data is merged into a structured format.
A concise summary is generated, highlighting the candidate’s most relevant qualifications and experiences.**

## 4. Voting, Consideration & Google Sheets
**HR reviews the summarized profile and assigns a rating (1-10).
Hiring insights and comments are recorded for evaluation.
All processed data, including extracted details and review scores, are appended to a Google Sheet for tracking and further consideration.**

assignments.value: We are a web agency looking for an Automation Expert skilled in workflow automation, API integrations, and AI-driven process optimization. The ideal candidate should have expertise in n8n, Python, and JavaScript, with a strong understanding of automation tools and webhooks. Experience in building custom automations for businesses is required.  Requirements:  Proficiency in n8n, Python, and JavaScript Experience in workflow automation, API integrations, and AI agents Ability to optimize business processes through automation Prior experience in the automation industry Must be based in Northern Italy If you have a passion for automation and want to work with a forward-thinking agency, we'd love to hear from you!

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: google Sheets  O Auth2  A P I details
google Drive  O Auth2  A P I details
open Ai  A P I details
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "On form submission".
Open the "Merge" node (n8n-nodes-base.merge) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Structured Output Parser" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Google Sheets" Google Sheets node.
Ensure you select the spreadsheet file and specific tab/sheet from the dropdown menus.
Map the input JSON keys to your target sheet columns.
Open the "Personal Info" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Qualification" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "HR Expert" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note1" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note2" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note3" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note4" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Upload to google drive" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleDrive) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Resume extraction" node (n8n-nodes-base.extractFromFile) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Summarizer" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "OpenAI Chat Model" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Error Handler" node (n8n-nodes-base.stopAndError) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "wanted profile".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Upon trigger activation, inputs will flow through the configured nodes and execute actions successfully.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
